description: Jackett control service - manages the Jackett server process

services.name: com.jackett.app.service
services.description: Downloads, starts, stops and monitors the Jackett server

commands.name: start
commands.description: Start Jackett (downloads it on first run)

commands.name: update
commands.description: Update Jackett to the latest release

commands.name: getLogs
commands.description: Return the tail of the Jackett log
